title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node.js and browsers; chat, generate, and stream completions from local Ollama models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama: drop-in LLM and embeddings wrappers for chains, agents, RAG, and more.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints) packaged in a single Docker image.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async wrappers over Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that streams answers from a local Ollama model via the JS SDK.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Electron desktop client for Ollama with system-tray integration and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds a local AI copilot powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats, generates code, and answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat interface for Ollama with session memory and parameter knobs.

title: ollama-cli-completions
summary: Bash/Zsh/Fish completion scripts for the ollama CLI (model names, commands, flags).

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and WebUI on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama (merged into nixpkgs) enabling reproducible local LLM installs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with Ollama’s API, supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for Ollama, enabling mobile and desktop apps to run local LLM chats.
